description: Hi - I'd like to pick up 2 quart jars of wildflower honey this week. What times work for pickup, and is it $20 a quart still? Can come by after 5 most days. Thanks, Joel
subject: Pickup time for 2 quart jars

description: Is the spring wildflower honey in stock yet? Bought a pint from you at the market last year and want more. If it's not ready when's the next batch? Thanks. Claudia
subject: Is spring wildflower honey in stock

description: This is the grocery desk at Ridgemont Co-op. We're running low on the 1 lb jars. Looking to restock - can you do a case of 12 and let us know wholesale pricing? Want it on the shelf before the weekend.
subject: Wholesale restock for the co-op

description: Do you have any comb honey available right now? My mother used to buy it and I'd love to get her a couple pieces. Will pay whatever it runs. Dana
subject: Comb honey availability

description: Will you be at the Briarwood market Saturday? Can you hold a case of pints for me to grab at the booth? Paying cash on pickup. Marcus
subject: Saturday market booth - hold a case

description: Quick question on the raw honey - is it unfiltered and unpasteurized? Trying to find local raw honey for allergies. Want to make sure before I buy. Tunde
subject: Raw unfiltered question

description: Want to order honey as a gift for my dad. Can someone else pick it up under my name, or do I need to be there? Looking for one quart in a nice jar if possible. Rachel
subject: Gift order pickup

description: Saw the spring batch isn't out yet. Can I pre-order 3 pints now and have them ready for pickup once the next harvest is jarred? Happy to pay ahead. Greg
subject: Pre-order spring pints

description: Is your honey local to the Philadelphia area? Where are the hives? I prefer to buy honey produced close to where I live for the pollen. Priya
subject: Where is the honey from

description: Do you sell bulk? I go through a lot of honey for baking. What's the price on a half gallon or gallon if you do that size? Stephen
subject: Bulk honey for baking

description: My honey crystallized in the jar. Is it still good, and how do I fix it? Didn't know if that means it went bad. Nora
subject: Honey crystallized in jar

description: Cedarbrook General Store receiving here. Need to restock honey for the front display. Can you bring two cases of the 1 lb jars on your next delivery run? Send the wholesale invoice. Order total will be over $200 so flag it if you need a PO.
subject: Wholesale restock for general store

description: Do you have creamed honey or just liquid? My kids like the spreadable kind on toast. Owen
subject: Creamed honey availability

description: Ordered a quart last month and loved it. Do you take Venmo or is it cash only at the booth? Want to grab two more this weekend. Carla
subject: Payment options at booth

description: When's the next harvest? I want to plan a few jars for gifts later in the year. Just trying to figure out when the new batch will be ready for pickup. Kevin
subject: When is next batch ready

description: Is the honey safe for someone with a tree nut allergy? No nuts involved in processing, right? Just being careful. Hana
subject: Allergen question on processing

description: Picked up fall honey from the booth and the lid was loose, leaked a little in the bag. Can I swap it next Saturday? Not a big deal but figured I'd ask. Russell
subject: Leaky lid on fall honey jar

description: Do you have empty jars or do I bring my own? Trying to reduce waste. Would refill be cheaper? Linda
subject: Bring my own jar for refill

description: Briarwood market vendor coordinator here. Confirming your booth for the winter Saturdays. Are you bringing honey through the cold months or pausing until the next harvest? Need to update the vendor map.
subject: Booth confirmation for winter market

description: What's the price difference between a pint and a quart? Trying to decide which to get. Also do you have a discount if I buy three or more? Andrea
subject: Pint vs quart pricing

description: Need 4 quarts for a family event in a few weeks. Can you set them aside for pickup? Want to make sure you have enough before I count on it. Thomas
subject: Hold 4 quarts for event

description: Is the honey ever heated? I read raw honey shouldn't be heated above a certain temp. Want to confirm yours stays raw. Mei
subject: Is the honey heated

description: Ridgemont Co-op grocery desk - following up on the last order. The 1 lb jars sold fast. Can we go to two cases on the next wholesale restock? Let me know the case price so I can update the order.
subject: Increase wholesale case order

description: First time buyer. Want a pint to try. Are you doing pickup this week or only at the Saturday market? Whatever's easier. Jenna
subject: First order - pickup or market
